title: Sass's Steven Universe
description: The steven universe mod of all steven universe mods
body: Do you want a **steven universe** mod???!?? OF COURSE U DO otherwise you wouldnt be here hehe! ANYWHO! This is THE steven universe mod with.....only one gem?? ARE YOU SERIOUS? well yeah but theres more to come! PLUS ITS PRETTY GOOD TO SAY I MADE THIS VERSION IN ONE DAY AND MY FIRST DAY MODDING MINECRAFT. so as i gain more knowledge about coding and modding minecraft this mod will evolve and be better! thanks for reading!
